Description: UTC date and time at which the RTT probe observation was recorded.
Validation Rules: Must be a valid ISO 8601 timestamp with UTC offset; must fall within the documented collection interval.
Source / Derivation: Derived directly from the raw ts_iso field.

Description: AWS region containing the node that generated the RTT measurement.
Validation Rules: Allowed values: us-east-1, us-west-2, eu-west-1, ap-northeast-1, ap-south-1.
Source / Derivation: Derived from the parent directory of the original source-node log.

Description: Stable anonymized identifier representing the source measurement node.
Validation Rules: Must begin with 'node_' and remain consistent for the same source node throughout the dataset.
Source / Derivation: Generated by applying a stable one-way hash to the original source-node identifier.

Description: AWS region containing the destination peer to which the RTT probe was sent.
Validation Rules: Allowed values: us-east-1, us-west-2, eu-west-1, ap-northeast-1, ap-south-1.
Source / Derivation: Renamed from the raw peer_region field.

Description: Stable anonymized identifier representing the destination peer node.
Validation Rules: Must begin with 'node_' and remain consistent for the same destination node throughout the dataset.
Source / Derivation: Generated by applying a stable one-way hash to the original peer IP address.

Description: Probe sequence number assigned by the measurement process; useful for reconstructing probe order and detecting missing observations.
Validation Rules: Must be an integer greater than or equal to zero; repeated values may occur across different source nodes.
Source / Derivation: Renamed from the raw seq field.

Description: Original measured round-trip time between the source and destination nodes.
Validation Rules: Must be numeric, non-negative, and represent the original measurement precision.
Source / Derivation: Renamed from the raw rtt_us field.

Description: Round-trip time converted to milliseconds for convenient statistical analysis and visualization.
Validation Rules: Must equal rtt_microseconds / 1000; must be non-negative.
